description: Check remaining LOGIN_REQUIRED services: baidu, character, poe. For each, navigate to the URL and check: (1) Does it require login to use chat? (2) If login required, can you create/use an account? (3) If accessible, type test input and check if APF blocks it.

steps: Check if login is required to access chat
If accessible without login, type test input and submit
Check Network tab for blocked/failed requests
Report: login_required, apf_blocked, warning_displayed, any redirects
Check if login is required to chat
If accessible, type test input and submit
Check Network tab - note if WebSocket is used for chat delivery
Check if login is required to chat
If accessible, type test input and submit
Check Network tab - note if WebSocket is used for chat delivery
